global_summary: This week demands 103 work-days company-wide, yet just 19 of 75 due are earned. Every project missed last week (Jul 13-19). Focus crews on trims, city inspections and Karim's foundation pour to hit Sun Jul 26.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Ginger Brown is stalled on this week's single work-day, none earned; slip 57%. Book the FINAL BUILDING INSPECTION now — its Mon Jul 20 window already passed.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Lingyan sits far behind — 4 of 24 due work-days earned; slip 64%. Get TILES: INSTALL TILES moving (now Mon Jul 27) and waterproof wet areas.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Clack has earned just 1 of 10 due work-days this week; slip 71%, still savable. Finish the secret door and pass FINAL: BUILDING INSPECTION by Fri Jul 24.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Felton earned none of 8 due work-days this week; slip 40%. Restart plumbing and mechanical trim plus INTERIOR PAINT: SECOND FLOOR CHANGE ORDER by Sun Jul 26.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Rohini earned none of 4 due work-days this week; slip 40%. Push FRAMING: REQUEST CITY INSPECTION (now Tue Jul 28) to unblock insulation.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Martha earned 1 of 4 due work-days this week; slip 20%, the smallest gap. Start SIDING: EXECUTE (due Thu Jul 23) and INSULATION: EXECUTE by Sat Jul 25.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Kyle earned 7 of 14 due work-days this week; slip 33%, still savable. Install ELECTRICAL and PLUMBING TRIM plus COUNTERTOPS by Sat Jul 25.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Karim earned 2 of 5 due work-days this week; slip 33%, still savable. Pour concrete (due Thu Jul 23) then start FOUNDATION: FOUNDATION CURE by Fri Jul 24.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Katie is slightly behind — 4 of 5 due work-days earned; slip 19%. Start TILES: INSTALL TILES (NO BACKSPLASH) by Fri Jul 24.
